name: the-menopause-reset-get-rid-of-your-symptoms-and-feel-like-your-younger-self
description: Dr. Mindy Pelz's guide to managing menopause through cellular health, intermittent fasting, ketogenic diet, and detox — addressing the root cause of hormone imbalance.
useCase: Manage menopause symptoms naturally through cellular repair, fasting, keto nutrition, and lifestyle changes that address root causes, not symptoms.
knownRisks: Medical advice — consult your doctor before starting fasting or keto
Not all approaches work for everyone
Some concepts may conflict with conventional medical advice
